_readme: Landing hero: set byAlbumNumber['1']..'12' (CSV album numbers). Optional fields per album: ax, ay (unit direction from center, about -1..1), rad (distance factor ~0.12-0.42), rotDeg (degrees), scale (0.45-0.95), z (stacking). Omitted fields use the built-in golden-angle scatter. Example for one album: {"6": {"ax": 0.2, "ay": -0.9, "rad": 0.35, "rotDeg": 8, "scale": 0.58, "z": 6}}
